rationale: In the citing paper, Xu, Chen, and Whinston (2011) appears only in a grouped literature-review citation alongside other auction/search papers. The citation is used to map a general research stream on advertising auctions and consumer search, not to provide a specific premise, mechanism, or model component that the 2014 paper then develops. There is no distinct follow-on discussion of that specific paper in the theory setup, equilibrium derivations, or interpretation of results.
